verses.text: Bring the firstfruits in a basket to the priest. Firstfruits. The first is given to God.
Bring the firstfruits in a basket to the priest. Firstfruits. The first is given to God.
Bring the firstfruits in a basket to the priest. Firstfruits. The first is given to God.
Bring the firstfruits in a basket to the priest. Firstfruits. The first is given to God.
Confess, 'A Syrian ready to perish was my father,' and God's deliverance. Confession. Remember whence God brought you.
Confess, 'A Syrian ready to perish was my father,' and God's deliverance. Confession. Remember whence God brought you.
Confess, 'A Syrian ready to perish was my father,' and God's deliverance. Confession. Remember whence God brought you.
Confess, 'A Syrian ready to perish was my father,' and God's deliverance. Confession. Remember whence God brought you.
Confess, 'A Syrian ready to perish was my father,' and God's deliverance. Confession. Remember whence God brought you.
Set the basket down and rejoice in God's goodness. Rejoice. Worship is glad thanksgiving.
Set the basket down and rejoice in God's goodness. Rejoice. Worship is glad thanksgiving.
In the third year, give the tithe to the Levite, stranger, and poor. The tithe. The needy are remembered.
In the third year, give the tithe to the Levite, stranger, and poor. The tithe. The needy are remembered.
Profess obedience and ask God's blessing from heaven. Profession. A clear conscience seeks blessing.
Profess obedience and ask God's blessing from heaven. Profession. A clear conscience seeks blessing.
Today you avouch the LORD to be your God. Avouched. The covenant is owned.
Today you avouch the LORD to be your God. Avouched. The covenant is owned.
And He avouches you His peculiar people. His own. God claims them for His glory.
And He avouches you His peculiar people. His own. God claims them for His glory.
